title: /kernel:run
summary_text: Validation memo (current `/kernel` run): - `KERNEL_RUN_ID` is unset and no run-bound receipt exists (`unknown-run`, `present:false`), so bootstrap is not yet compliant. - Latest live external evidence is usable for `normal` shape via `glm` + `copilot` (`glm ok` at `2026-03-27T12:53:20Z`, `copilot ok` at `2026-03-27T12:52:33Z`), while `gemini-cli` remains unstable. - Acknowledgement formatting requirements are confirmed from [kernel.md#L74](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L74) and [kernel.md#L94](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L94). Validated receipt payload for this run: ```bash KERNEL_RUN_ID="kernel-20260327T125407Z" \ KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_ACTIVE_MODELS_CSV="gpt-5.3-codex-spark,glm-4.5-air" \ KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_MANIFEST_LANE_COUNT="6" \ KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_AGENT_LABELS="true" \ KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_SUBAGENT_LABELS="true" \ bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write \ 6 \ "codex,glm,copilot" \ "normal" \ "kernel-bootstrap:/kernel:run" ``` Acknowledgement format to validate against: 1. `Kernel orchestration is active for this session.` 2. `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` 3. `Active models: ...` (live evidence only, no guessed model names) 4. `Lane manifest:` 5. At least 6 flat bullets in the exact required form with `[provider:] [agent:] [subagent:]` on each line.
